source: crowell.com, hsfkramer.com, theguardian.com, pbs.org, eurocomply.app, dataversity.net, reuters.com, gizmodo.com

scenes.headline: **Voluntary AI Model Standards**: Global Implications
scenes.sub: Analyzing the US's Pioneering Move in AI Regulation
scenes.vo: Welcome to the future of AI regulation. The US is forging ahead with **Voluntary AI Model Standards**, and the implications are global. Find out what this means for the world.

scenes.heading: Key Developments

items.title: US Talks with AI Companies for Voluntary Standards
Trump Administration Near Deal with Big AI
EU AI Act vs NIST AI RMF: Mandatory vs Voluntary

scenes.vo: Key developments are reshaping the AI landscape. From Executive Orders to risk management frameworks, we break down the top updates you need to know.

scenes.label: Max EU AI Act Fine (Turnover % or Flat)
scenes.vo: Compliance comes with a price. The EU AI Act imposes fines up to €35M or 7% of global annual turnover, contrasting sharply with the U.S.'s voluntary approach.

scenes.heading: **Executive Order Highlights**
bullets: Voluntary framework for pre-release AI model review
Focus on cybersecurity and national security risks
Impact on companies like Anthropic and OpenAI
scenes.vo: **Executive Order Highlights**: Voluntary submission of cutting-edge AI models for federal review, focusing on cybersecurity and national security risks. A new era of cooperation or constraint?

scenes.headline: New here? Subscribe
scenes.vo: And if you're watching The Inference for the first time, and you're into AI news, tools and tech breakdowns, do hit subscribe — we drop a fresh one every day.

scenes.quote: **'Creating a unified AI governance framework aligned to the highest bar'**
scenes.vo: 'Creating a unified AI governance framework aligned to the highest bar' — the ambitious goal behind the U.S. strategy. But can voluntary standards achieve this lofty aim?

scenes.title: EU AI Act vs NIST AI RMF
scenes.vo: EU AI Act vs NIST AI RMF: Mandatory law with significant fines vs voluntary guidance. How do these differing approaches impact global tech compliance strategies?

scenes.label: EU AI Act High-Risk AI Deadline
scenes.vo: Mark your calendars: **2 August 2026**, the deadline for high-risk AI system compliance under the EU AI Act. Will the U.S. voluntary model influence last-minute adjustments?

scenes.heading: **Implications for the Global Tech Landscape**
bullets: Impact on AI innovation and security
scenes.vo: What do these voluntary standards mean for the **Global Tech Landscape**? From delayed launches to international collaborations, the ripple effects are far-reaching.

scenes.headline: **US Voluntary AI Standards: A New Global Benchmark?**
scenes.cta: Subscribe to The Inference for More AI Insights
scenes.vo: **US Voluntary AI Standards: A New Global Benchmark?** As the world watches, one question remains — will the rest of the globe follow the U.S. lead or the EU's mandatory path?
